channel.title: INall
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INall, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Bug in student admissions website exposed children’s personal information
item.description: Ravenna Hub, which lets parents apply and track the status of their kids' applications across thousands of schools, allowed any logged-in user to acce...

item.title: Relaxing immigration policies in America may actually save lives
item.description: New research says targeted immigration policies can address workforce shortages and support the U.S. population as it ages.

item.title: Say goodbye to the 4 p.m. closing bell: Your stocks are becoming 24/7 digital cash
item.description: Tokenized equities — real shares of stock wrapped or reissued as blockchain tokens — threaten traditional brokerages.

item.title: ‘I have a moral and ethical conundrum’: My husband was killed by a careless driver. I received $2 million. What do I owe my stepdaughter?
item.description: “As the children grew, life became more complicated.”

item.title: United unveils huge MileagePlus shakeup, tightens basic economy policies
item.description: United Airlines announced a big shakeup in how its MileagePlus loyalty members earn miles, offering better deals for elite status members and credit c...

item.title: ‘This is stressful for my parents’: My siblings harass our mother and father for money. Should they be cut out of their will?
item.description: “My parents have asked me to help them secure their assets when they pass on.”

item.title: This Two-Food Combo May Be The Secret Inflammation Fix You're Missing
item.description: Kefir paired with prebiotic fiber may reduce inflammation better than omega-3s alone

item.title: Sex toys maker Tenga says hacker stole customer information
item.description: The Japanese sex toy maker said a hacker broke into an employee's inbox and stole customer names, email addresses, and correspondence, including order...

item.title: Rashee Rice Ex Dacoda Jones Posts Heartfelt Message To Son After Accusing NFL Star Of Abuse
item.description: Dacoda Jones is keeping the focus on her little boy -- just days after accusing Kansas City Chiefs star Rashee Rice of abuse in a bombshell lawsuit. T...

item.title: 'Buffy the Vampire Slayer' Star James Marsters Finalizes Divorce
item.description: "Buffy the Vampire Slayer" star James Marsters is on his way to staking his way out of marriage number two ... he's finally settling his divorce from ...

item.title: These 2 Brain Receptors May Be the Key To Slowing Alzheimer’s
item.description: Early research points to a safer path forward

item.title: Reload wants to give your AI agents a shared memory
item.description: Reload announces a $2.275 million raise in a round led by Anthemis and the launch of its first AI employee, Epic.

item.title: These are the hotel openings TPG is most excited for in 2026
item.description: Read TPG's list of the most anticipated hotel openings of 2026, from major points brands like Marriott, Hyatt and Hilton — plus independent and luxury...

item.title: Current is a new RSS reader that’s more like a river than an inbox
item.description: Current introduces a stress-free, totally reimagined RSS news reading app as a one-time paid download.

item.title: This Easy, Daily Habit Helps You Better Support Your Liver Health
item.description: Give juice cleanses the boot for this science-backed solution.

item.title: This fund that now says it’ll never open up for withdrawals has El-Erian making Bear Stearns parallels
item.description: A $1.6 billion fund at the center of concerns over private debt is now abandoning plans to let investors withdraw their money.

item.title: Jaguar Driver Crashes Into School Bus on Video, Later Arrested for DV at Home
item.description: An out-of-control driver slammed into the back of a school bus on a Florida street, shearing off his roof, somehow survived ... and later got arrested...

item.title: LaMelo Ball Spotted Dipping Into Lamborghini After Car Crash In Charlotte
item.description: LaMelo Ball was in no mood to be seen after his car crash in Charlotte ... new video obtained by TMZ Sports shows the Hornets hooper quickly dipping i...

item.title: Queen Camilla Ignores Questions at Royal Outing About Ex-Prince Andrew's Arrest
item.description: Queen Camilla didn't waste time shedding any tears over former Prince Andrew on Thursday ... she was snapped carrying on with royal affairs just hours...

item.title: Do Vibration Plates Really Work? I Used One Every Day To Find Out
item.description: The viral wellness trend promises everything—but does it deliver? I found out.

item.title: OpenAI reportedly finalizing $100B deal at more than $850B valuation
item.description: OpenAI is reportedly getting close to closing a $100 billion deal, with backers including Amazon, Nvidia, SoftBank, and Microsoft. The deal would valu...

item.title: Bank of America expands rewards access with new no-fee loyalty program
item.description: Meet BofA Rewards, Bank of America's new no-fee loyalty program with new tiers, benefits and more.

item.title: 9 valuable travel perks that you can get with a credit card
item.description: Curious about the perks you can get with a travel card? Here's everything you need to know.

item.title: Health Experts Don't Want You To Use Vegetable Oil—Here's What To Do Instead
item.description: There are better options.

item.title: American Airlines tweaks bag fees: Why you'll definitely want to plan ahead
item.description: American Airlines announced a change in how much it will charge certain customers for their checked bags.
